criteria.label: List four capability areas Claude is designed for and give one example each.
criteria.example: Language: summarize meeting notes. Reasoning: compare vendor options. Coding: explain a stack trace. Vision: review a UI screenshot.

criteria.label: Sketch the tool-use loop roles (App, Claude, Tool) in order.
criteria.example: App sends message → Claude returns tool_use → App runs tool → App sends tool_result → Claude answers user.

criteria.label: Identify one capability mistake (wrong model or unverified code) and the fix.
criteria.example: Mistake: run generated migration SQL without review. Fix: run on staging, add tests, human DBA sign-off.
